nodes.label: This is NOT the Next.js you know
nodes.norm_label: this is not the next.js you know

nodes.label: CRITICAL-1 **[BLOCKER]** — All Decimal/NUMERIC columns silently migrate as 0 — tokio-postgres has no decimal feature enabled
nodes.norm_label: critical-1 **[blocker]** — all decimal/numeric columns silently migrate as 0 — tokio-postgres has no decimal feature enabled

nodes.label: HIGH-1 **[BLOCKER]** — Cross-tenant / IDOR poder creation: otorgante_id and apoderado_id are trusted from the request body and never verified against the caller's conjunto
nodes.norm_label: high-1 **[blocker]** — cross-tenant / idor poder creation: otorgante_id and apoderado_id are trusted from the request body and never verified against the caller's conjunto

nodes.label: HIGH-2 **[BLOCKER]** — compute_effective_coeficiente aggregates otorgante unit coefficients with no conjunto scoping, enabling cross-tenant vote-weight inflation
nodes.norm_label: high-2 **[blocker]** — compute_effective_coeficiente aggregates otorgante unit coefficients with no conjunto scoping, enabling cross-tenant vote-weight inflation

nodes.label: HIGH-3 **[BLOCKER]** — Global UNIQUE on vehiculos.placa leaks/blocks across tenants (Law 2 boundary)
nodes.norm_label: high-3 **[blocker]** — global unique on vehiculos.placa leaks/blocks across tenants (law 2 boundary)

nodes.label: HIGH-4 **[BLOCKER]** — Clasificados create + filter is fully broken: frontend categories never match backend CatLocal enum
nodes.norm_label: high-4 **[blocker]** — clasificados create + filter is fully broken: frontend categories never match backend catlocal enum

nodes.label: HIGH-5 **[BLOCKER]** — Clasificados form writes title into a non-existent field, so nombre is always empty
nodes.norm_label: high-5 **[blocker]** — clasificados form writes title into a non-existent field, so nombre is always empty

nodes.label: HIGH-6 **[BLOCKER]** — vehiculos.placa UNIQUE is global, not per-conjunto: cross-tenant collision and existence leak on trámite approval
nodes.norm_label: high-6 **[blocker]** — vehiculos.placa unique is global, not per-conjunto: cross-tenant collision and existence leak on tramite approval

nodes.label: HIGH-7 **[BLOCKER]** — Poderes (proxy votes) double-count the otorgante's coefficient — otorgante can still cast their own vote
nodes.norm_label: high-7 **[blocker]** — poderes (proxy votes) double-count the otorgante's coefficient — otorgante can still cast their own vote

nodes.label: HIGH-8 **[BLOCKER]** — Voters without a unit bypass the one-vote-per-unit constraint (NULL unidad_id) and get a fabricated 0.01 coefficient
nodes.norm_label: high-8 **[blocker]** — voters without a unit bypass the one-vote-per-unit constraint (null unidad_id) and get a fabricated 0.01 coefficient

nodes.label: HIGH-9 **[BLOCKER]** — create_poder accepts arbitrary otorgante_id/apoderado_id with no tenant or membership validation
nodes.norm_label: high-9 **[blocker]** — create_poder accepts arbitrary otorgante_id/apoderado_id with no tenant or membership validation

nodes.label: HIGH-10 **[BLOCKER]** — Storage falls back to FakeStorage in production and persists fake localhost URLs (Law 4 violation)
nodes.norm_label: high-10 **[blocker]** — storage falls back to fakestorage in production and persists fake localhost urls (law 4 violation)

nodes.label: HIGH-11 **[BLOCKER]** — No request timeout layer — slow upstreams (Gemini/S3/DB) can pin the pool and worker tasks indefinitely
nodes.norm_label: high-11 **[blocker]** — no request timeout layer — slow upstreams (gemini/s3/db) can pin the pool and worker tasks indefinitely

nodes.label: HIGH-12 — Logout and password change do not invalidate outstanding JWTs; 30-day tokens remain valid after sign-out
nodes.norm_label: high-12 — logout and password change do not invalidate outstanding jwts; 30-day tokens remain valid after sign-out

nodes.label: HIGH-13 — Bearer token stored in localStorage (XSS-exfiltratable) defeats the HttpOnly cookie
nodes.norm_label: high-13 — bearer token stored in localstorage (xss-exfiltratable) defeats the httponly cookie

nodes.label: HIGH-14 — Double-booking race condition: reservation overlap check is not serializable and has no DB-level exclusion constraint
nodes.norm_label: high-14 — double-booking race condition: reservation overlap check is not serializable and has no db-level exclusion constraint

nodes.label: HIGH-15 — No transactions: partial failure leaves the target DB in an inconsistent, half-migrated state
nodes.norm_label: high-15 — no transactions: partial failure leaves the target db in an inconsistent, half-migrated state

nodes.label: HIGH-16 — --seed-demo has no production guard and can run against the prod database
nodes.norm_label: high-16 — --seed-demo has no production guard and can run against the prod database

nodes.label: HIGH-17 — --verify only compares COUNT(*); it does not check FK integrity or field equality and produces false mismatches
nodes.norm_label: high-17 — --verify only compares count(*); it does not check fk integrity or field equality and produces false mismatches

nodes.label: HIGH-18 — JWT stored in localStorage — XSS can exfiltrate a 30-day session token
nodes.norm_label: high-18 — jwt stored in localstorage — xss can exfiltrate a 30-day session token

nodes.label: MEDIUM-1 — No rate limiting or lockout on login / password / pairing-PIN endpoints enables brute-force
nodes.norm_label: medium-1 — no rate limiting or lockout on login / password / pairing-pin endpoints enables brute-force

nodes.label: MEDIUM-2 — pagar() performs no status-transition validation, allows re-paying or paying disputed/voided charges
nodes.norm_label: medium-2 — pagar() performs no status-transition validation, allows re-paying or paying disputed/voided charges

nodes.label: MEDIUM-3 — Pairing PIN verification endpoint has no brute-force / rate-limit protection
nodes.norm_label: medium-3 — pairing pin verification endpoint has no brute-force / rate-limit protection

nodes.label: MEDIUM-4 — Residents can self-register attendance and cast votes with no active-session or admin gate
nodes.norm_label: medium-4 — residents can self-register attendance and cast votes with no active-session or admin gate

nodes.label: MEDIUM-5 — WebSocket clients silently dropped on broadcast lag with no resync (backpressure)
nodes.norm_label: medium-5 — websocket clients silently dropped on broadcast lag with no resync (backpressure)

nodes.label: MEDIUM-6 — Gemini API key passed in URL query string (secret-in-URL logging risk)
nodes.norm_label: medium-6 — gemini api key passed in url query string (secret-in-url logging risk)

nodes.label: MEDIUM-7 — No graceful shutdown — SIGTERM drops in-flight requests and open DB connections
nodes.norm_label: medium-7 — no graceful shutdown — sigterm drops in-flight requests and open db connections

nodes.label: MEDIUM-8 — No panic-catch layer — a handler panic aborts the connection instead of returning a clean 500
nodes.norm_label: medium-8 — no panic-catch layer — a handler panic aborts the connection instead of returning a clean 500

nodes.label: MEDIUM-9 — Required legacy timestamps that fail to decode are silently written as the Unix epoch (1970-01-01)
nodes.norm_label: medium-9 — required legacy timestamps that fail to decode are silently written as the unix epoch (1970-01-01)

nodes.label: MEDIUM-10 — No global 401 handler: expired/revoked session leaves stale user state, no auto-logout or redirect
nodes.norm_label: medium-10 — no global 401 handler: expired/revoked session leaves stale user state, no auto-logout or redirect

nodes.label: MEDIUM-11 — Session cookie is not Secure in the non-cross-site (same-site) deployment branch
nodes.norm_label: medium-11 — session cookie is not secure in the non-cross-site (same-site) deployment branch

nodes.label: MEDIUM-12 — mustChangePassword is returned by the backend but never enforced anywhere in the frontend
nodes.norm_label: medium-12 — mustchangepassword is returned by the backend but never enforced anywhere in the frontend

nodes.label: LOW-1 — ai/repo.rs acta and subtitulo queries filter only by asamblea_id with no conjunto join in the repo layer (latent)
nodes.norm_label: low-1 — ai/repo.rs acta and subtitulo queries filter only by asamblea_id with no conjunto join in the repo layer (latent)

nodes.label: LOW-2 — JWT verification uses Validation::default() with no audience/issuer binding
nodes.norm_label: low-2 — jwt verification uses validation::default() with no audience/issuer binding

nodes.label: LOW-3 — Resident/gate visit creation accepts arbitrary client-supplied fecha with no bounds (backdated/forward-dated gate records)
nodes.norm_label: low-3 — resident/gate visit creation accepts arbitrary client-supplied fecha with no bounds (backdated/forward-dated gate records)

nodes.label: LOW-4 — listar_anuncios ignores expires_en: expired announcements are still served and still trigger resident notifications
nodes.norm_label: low-4 — listar_anuncios ignores expires_en: expired announcements are still served and still trigger resident notifications

nodes.label: LOW-5 — Announcement and PQRS/trámite notification fan-out runs one INSERT per recipient in a single transaction (unbounded N queries)
nodes.norm_label: low-5 — announcement and pqrs/tramite notification fan-out runs one insert per recipient in a single transaction (unbounded n queries)

nodes.label: LOW-6 — No length bounds on free-text content fields (titulo/contenido/descripcion/payload); only the 2MB body limit protects the DB
nodes.norm_label: low-6 — no length bounds on free-text content fields (titulo/contenido/descripcion/payload); only the 2mb body limit protects the db

nodes.label: LOW-7 — No edit/delete authorization surface for clasificados and inmuebles; residents cannot remove or correct their own listings
nodes.norm_label: low-7 — no edit/delete authorization surface for clasificados and inmuebles; residents cannot remove or correct their own listings

nodes.label: LOW-8 — bootstrap_unidad inserts a new unit on every profile save with no dedup, creating orphan units that distort quorum totals
nodes.norm_label: low-8 — bootstrap_unidad inserts a new unit on every profile save with no dedup, creating orphan units that distort quorum totals

nodes.label: LOW-9 — link_pairing UPDATE does not re-filter conjunto_id or expiry, relying solely on the prior scan
nodes.norm_label: low-9 — link_pairing update does not re-filter conjunto_id or expiry, relying solely on the prior scan

nodes.label: LOW-10 — hash_firma uses a fully client-/server-derivable input with no secret — not a tamper-evident signature
nodes.norm_label: low-10 — hash_firma uses a fully client-/server-derivable input with no secret — not a tamper-evident signature

nodes.label: LOW-11 — update_session lets an admin deactivate the assembly via the generic CAS update with no distinct audit/state-machine guard
nodes.norm_label: low-11 — update_session lets an admin deactivate the assembly via the generic cas update with no distinct audit/state-machine guard

nodes.label: LOW-12 — Push notifications silently faked in production — LogOnlyPushSender returns Ok and inflates sent count (Law 4 violation)
nodes.norm_label: low-12 — push notifications silently faked in production — logonlypushsender returns ok and inflates sent count (law 4 violation)

nodes.label: LOW-13 — WebSocket has no server-side ping/keepalive or idle timeout — dead/half-open connections leak
nodes.norm_label: low-13 — websocket has no server-side ping/keepalive or idle timeout — dead/half-open connections leak

nodes.label: LOW-14 — LiveKit token grants canSubscribe to any tenant member with a valid asamblea token; room scoping relies solely on room name
nodes.norm_label: low-14 — livekit token grants cansubscribe to any tenant member with a valid asamblea token; room scoping relies solely on room name

nodes.norm_label: low-15 — push-subscription migration only runs on the first successful user insert, so it is not re-run-safe for transient failures

nodes.norm_label: low-16 — legacy plaintext passwords shorter than 6 chars are discarded and forced to a placeholder

nodes.norm_label: low-17 — websocket reconnect loop never stops on auth rejection (no backoff, no cap)
